name: Ada_Sqlite3.Generic_Functions

simple_types.name: Function_Args
simple_types.code:
type Function_Args (First_Index : Interfaces.C.size_t;
                   Last_Index  : Interfaces.C.size_t) is private;

simple_types.name: Result_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Result_Kind is (
   Null_Result,
   Int_Result,
   Int64_Result,
   Float_Result,
   Double_Result,
   Text_Result,
   Text_UTF8_Result,
   Text_UTF16_Result,
   …,
   Zeroblob_Result
);

record_types.name: Result_Type

access_types.name: Function_Callback
access_types.code:
type Function_Callback is access 
  function (Args : Function_Args; Context : Context_Type) return Result_Type;

access_types.name: Inverse_Procedure
access_types.code:
type Inverse_Procedure is access 
  procedure (Args : Function_Args; Context : Context_Type);

access_types.name: No_Args_Callback
access_types.code:
type No_Args_Callback is access 
  function (Context : Context_Type) return Result_Type;

generic_instantiations.name: Blob_Holders
generic_instantiations.code:
package Blob_Holders is new Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Holders
  (Element_Type => Ada.Streams.Stream_Element_Array);

generic_instantiations.name: Context_Holders
generic_instantiations.code:
package Context_Holders is new Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Holders
  (Element_Type => Context_Type);

generic_instantiations.name: String_Holders
generic_instantiations.code:
package String_Holders is new Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Holders
  (Element_Type => String);

generic_instantiations.name: Wide_String_Holders
generic_instantiations.code:
package Wide_String_Holders is new Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Holders
